column1: Hurricane Debby's Eastern eyewall is making landfall North of Cedar Key. Winds are still 80 mph in a small area. Fortunately,  the storm never rapidly intensified in the very warm Gulf water.
Denis do you ever sleep 😭
Denis Phillips in denis we trust 🙌🏻
Denis Phillips Thank you for your constant support to Tampa Bay and surrounding areas.
Denis Phillips you put our minds at ease, had you on my app as we sat in the closet for the two tornado warnings here in Lakewood Ranch, can’t thank you enough!!
Denis Phillips Not sleeping tonight either. Exact repeat of Idalia. Waiting for the water to rise even higher.
Denis Phillips Thank you!
Denis Phillips thank you!
Denis Phillips you're like our weather guys in Oklahoma during tornado season and like them, you're all business when the chips are down. It's much appreciated.
where are you?
only Dec 1st thru May 31st!
Denis Phillips is a MACHINE...
It’s so nasty here in Fort White right now🙈 the wind is crazy and nonstop rain since yesterday😔 I pray HE covers us all with HIS protection🙏🏻

that has been my mantra through all this. " The Lord will protect me " ( live alone ). Pinellas County got slammed good hours and hours ago and still dealing with rain bands, wind and tornadoes. It's making landfall at 80mph. This
" tropical storm " covering the whole state. My prayers are with everyone.
idk sounds like he covered you with a hurricane ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
yep seems that way

we just moved from ft white to Ocala!
Stay safe .. & yes, HE has got us all!!🙏🏽
🙏🛐🛐🙏 Praying in agreement with you sister. 🙏🛐🛐🙏
we are supposed to go to Fort White today from Sarasota. We got over 18 inches of rain here. I'm curious how the Sante fe river is going to hold without flooding the area where we are supposed to go
I’m pretty sure it’s already risen, but the real flooding will be in the next couple of days🤦🏻‍♀️
that's what I'm thinking. I bought trip insurance through air bnb and I hope they allow this as a reason. Don't want to sit around a flooded area!
Jake from State Farm?
I agree with you in prayer 🙏

Gulfport had it bad, my friends on Boca Ciega lost many vessels, their homes.
And a dear friend who had just helped another friend, drowned
When his sailboat sunk.
The community is hurting.
It was awful on the water.

Praying for our coastal people. Cedar Key gets those sustained winds and rain bands with the surge as the eye comes in above them.
We're a close knit Tri-County with many family and friends in Levy, Dixie, and Gilchrist. We're awake everywhere praying, especially for Cedar Key, Suwannee, Horseshoe, and Steinhatchee.
Praying too
standing with you in prayer….
cedar key is under water again from surge

Getting some wind gusts and reported power outages in Lakeland. Nothing like Ian and Irma though, thankfully.
Praying for the Coast and especially Cedar Key. I swear they get knocked with a big one more often than not. 🙁
our power was out in the Kathleen area for about 45 minutes and is back on. Definitely nothing intense out there but the gusts have been making me pay attention haha
ours is still out in Highland Fairways, near Kathleen!
I'm by Socrum Loop and still have power right now, thankfully! The windows aren't rattling as bad with these gusts like any of the storms I've been through. My pup is definitely confused though lol.
Any information on the flooding in the cove K golf course at Bayshore Drive, Clearwater?
Still going in Lakewood Ranch 😞Hopefully, she stops soon.
I have to drive there from Bradenton for work at 7, so scared hope it slows down
be safe!
the streets in my LWR community are flooded, good luck and be careful
whiich one?
Central Park
In the Carrollwood/Northdale area and we’ve had more rain from Debby than from the last two hurricanes.
Same in Keystone!!!
Cypress preserve in our backyard in Northdale

I will never, ever again say, “Meh, it ‘just’ a Tropical Storm”. I’ve lived here 30 years and I haven’t seen that much rain in such a short period of time.
Denis - thank you for all you do. Rule #7
Years ago we had a tropical storm that did as much damage as a hurricane! The "No Name Storm"!!!
March 14, 1993 I believe.
absolutely the same here! this one was a serious rain maker!
we sure made up for such a dry summer last year!
Where are you?
South Clearwater bordering Largo
I agree. I was expecting much less. This TS shot my nerves.
You're a wise woman. Tropical Storms and Cat 1's can cause a LOT of flooding.
Water hasn't come over our seawall yet, but our kids really want to try walking on our dock ramp lol
let them use it as a Slip-n-slide
Ohmigerd
Still pouring in Parrish & wild wind!
I downloaded an app that says we have had 7.11 inches so far. I don’t believe it. It seems so much worse than that
same here in Sun City Center.
We have over 12" in Bradenton.
it’s been intense, hasn’t it ? I thought we would get little breaks. Nope
No hurricane is good but a cat one with winds of 80 miles a hour is a whole lot better then a cat 5.
I keep saying, “here we go again” every time I hear the rain hit my house. It just keeps going.🥲
same. The noise for sure shot my nerves.
Thank you for your coverage. Appreciate it.
My parking lot is flooded 🤗✨
How is it in St Pete?
flooding in parts of St pete
just got another tornado warning. Still raining, still wind gusts. I'm about 5 miles north of Tropicana Field. Take care if DOT says don't drive in this DON'T.
we are good in St Pete but we are on higher ground

The flooding is incredible in some of the pictures in Pinellas, places flooded that I have never seen flooding before since I have moved here in 83. People going out today, check your route to make sure you can even get where you are going, There are abandon cars in the floodwaters blocking roads.
no thanks to over building, cementing everything in, nonstop building, etc. where is water supposed to go besides the surge? The ripping up of every inch of land. It's only going to get worse.
yes!
This has been a beast of a storm . I’m glad it didn’t rapidly intensify
Non stop rain and very very windy in Sarasota
same in Nokomis.
thought I was going to go to work today but, I’m not chancing my car stalling out on flooded roadways or hydroplaning. Going to stay home and enjoy this very windy and rainy day and be safe.
Yes. Heavy rain, lightning, thunder and tornado watch still in Nokomis
Sarasota winds blowing! RAIN!!Lightening and distant thunder. Is the inland stream flooding over?
I honestly don’t know. I know that the entrance to my condo is flooded and, all its surrounding streets are as well. I live near the old greyhound racing track and, the airport.

Dennis, why on earth the constant notifications of flash flash flooding for Spring hill last night What are we supposed to do get in our canoes and paddle? Created so much anxiety for situation that nothing could be done in.
it's so you stay IN or take precautions if necessary.
for your safety
Can't swim in the dark 2 feet of water get real!
Thank you Dennis! Really appreciate your updates!
Absolutely crazy rain in Bradenton!
Yes! It has not let up. As others have said, I don't ever remember this much rain for just a tropical storm. It's windy right now also.
Rain finally letting up, after 24+ hours, here in Sarasota👍
it's still pretty windy and still raining in my area of Sarasota
still raining and windy in Port Charlotte but not as bad
everytime I say that it hits again.
Just woken up by thunder and lightning here in Sun City Center. So much rain and wind from this. Much more than Idalia.
What made it turn? Did it wobble?
yes, it wobbled all over Madeira Beach… While The eye may not have gone over us , right next to the eye went over us🙏4 All.
Raining again here about 5 miles inland from AMI. But I did see where the new "ponds" have receded some. I believe we are to get another inch or two of rain today.
Anyone in South Tampa/Port Tampa?
davis islands, water is super high and many islanders do not have power
bayshore by Inman is flooding - that’s the view looking towards tgh
yup typical Bayshore
Can't sleep

s Tampa Davis Islands made out ok
Bayshore flooded as usual but mostly receded this am when I left 0600 for work
yes. Dry here but I do have a tree down
yup
very wet here
I am dry
Great job Dennis Phillips❤️
How are things in Tallahassee? My daughter is at FSU all alone.
Johnny is there too🙏🏻
Really heavy rain and some wind and lightning in Ocala. Prayers for all and stay safe
yes it is windy as can be here in Ocala. Rain hasn't really stopped since about 1 pm yesterday. Praying now that the eye is going into land this mess hurries up and calms down.
John T. is out in Paris right now too, so he'll see things when arriving back !!
it’s equally scary in Gainesville. I have horses and I’m very upset WEC didn’t offer us evacuation. This is far worse than Idalia for us.
are you ok? Are the horses?
not sure as they live 15 minutes from me and I can’t get to them til morning. Praying they are okay.

they will be ok... i have horses and they are smarter in this
weather... Better than humans
Anyone been or heard about downtown Tampa? Are we flooded or ok to drive in?
Craziest storm I've ever seen. Still pouring in valrico
what county is Valicro in?
Hillsborough
Currently in the Disney bubble and woke up with rain water inside the room. The wind is so hard it pushed water in.
It hasn’t stopped raining here in East Lake since yesterday at 10am. Wow. 😮
any idea how east lake rd is looking- flooding?
no. I haven’t been on the road since yesterday around 4-5pm.
I have to get from lakeland to brandon( Bloomingdale) going down 60 for work. How is it over there because the wind sounds awful here?!
same as there
Brandon is rain and more rain, not to worry.

Rain bands & thunder still coming through Tampa. I’m in Tampa Heights 5 min north of downtown Tampa off Florida Ave.
No power loss here
Debby has definitely overstayed her welcome here in Weeki Wachee. Geesh! Move along.
she sure has. How are you doing?
How is it in Port Richey??

The tide is supposed to be about halfway to low tide right now and there’s water in the road at the storm drains so the rest of today will be the possible surge event. Rain has stopped right now but logged almost 15” since yesterday morning. Wind was steady but never got over 42ish. Average was around 30 most of the time.
Anyone on Anna Maria island? How is it there?
Thank you
flooded everywhere, still raining and windy
How are things in appalachicola?
Anyone in Deltona? How is it there?
Our power has been out for 10 hrs here in Dunedin. Its still down pouring rain. Yard is pretty flooded. This is the first time in 4 years we’ve had water close to the front and back doors.
where are you in Dunedin? We are south of downtown, just off of Edgewater. We were without power for 6 hours yesterday and the rain was relentless. Flooding in your area?
we are off San Salvador backing up towards hammock park
still no power or eta
So sorry to hear no ETA 😩
same here 😓
Why do these storms seem to come at night??

It does seems this way doesn’t it? I’ve been through every South Florida Hurricane since Andrew. Charley was the only one I can remember hitting in broad daylight.
Update; I think Wilma hit at daybreak.
Jean hit during the day too but I agree most of the time it happens in the night and I hate that part.

I remember Jeanne well. I’m in the Southern part of the state and some of it hit us in the early morning hours when it was still dark. I drove home at daybreak in the eye of the storm. One of the creepiest experiences ever. The wind was calm and I could see blue sky directly above, with the swirling clouds in the distance. My drive home was 13 miles and no cops were on the road. Needless to say, I drove triple digit speeds to beat the second half. About 20 minutes after I got home, it started up again.
I grew up in Ohio, I thought the same thing sitting in the basement at night for tornado warnings. It sure messes with the anxiety 😬. Been here since the mid 80’s, this storm has been crazy.
I said the same thing.
i want to know too!
Thank you, as always. Unfortunately, my dog never heard of rule #7 and hasn’t eaten and refuses to go outside.
I always keep wee wee pads in the bathroom because my pup is so scared of storms he won’t go outside either. He is hiding under the blanket now.

the last hurricane I had a baby pool in dirt & sod on my back porch and neither of them would even go in it. She is just too nervous and senses so much. The other one is 10 and he has been great and just went outside and I think he went potty for about three minutes straight, but she will not go out.

that’s sounds like my pups. I have one who is 15 and he is not phased by the storms because he can’t hear them I believe and he will go outside if I let him but my 5 year old pup is so scared. He always knows when it’s going to storm before I hear it.
Currently in the Disney bubble and woke up with rain water inside the room. The wind is so hard it pushed water in.
I was just getting ready to order a foldable baby/pet pool for next time. My pup isn’t really afraid- I hope she will use it. She has never used pads.
oh no poor baby
thank goodness we had a successful potty break for both in between bands! Whew!
Thanks for letting us know, I’m sure you’re getting exhausted with this one Denis❗️⛈️ and here we go again today☔️💦 😝 this is the most rain I’ve seen in one storm in 22 years‼️
How are people expected to get to work this morning? We’re still in the middle of this storm and warnings. Too dangerous to be on the roads.
yep crazy. My bf delivers things across florida. Thinking of every delivery driver out there today. Be safe y'all

I wonder the same thing. Hillsborough county had teachers drive to work today even without students. Multiple other counties closed.
It’s terrible for so many!
I agree and am one of those people. Have to drive at 7 and I’m scared
my hubby just left too he delivers CO2 I’m so worried about him driving right now 🙏🙏
my husbands a driver and is supposed to head to Jax. I forbid him to go!!
😞 Sorry.
so don’t go in.
I think they will understand. Frankly if they don’t you are working in the wrong place.

I’m here at work because I’m a team player. 🤩
Original post was really intended to express concern for others (like my son) who have long commutes across bridges or cars that are low to the ground because of the flooding. Stay safe all!
Go away Debby. You’re not welcome here anymore.
Eleventy billion inches of rain at my house.. East Manatee
that’s a lot! 😂 Hope you are doing well.
for realz!! Hope your well too 🥰
A bit waterlogged for sure, but all good otherwise.
This storm was way more than I expected. These winds and rain are pretty intense and they have been going on for hours on end. Almost scared to see what it will look like in daylight hours. 😱
I really dislike when they come through a night. This has been a long storm though so it was day and night.
agree. It’s been horrific here in treasure island and continues. this storm is relentless
I have a small lake in my yard
I feel the same ! It’s been intense .
So far 2 potted trees down and two panels off the pool cage at 2:30 am. S Bradenton.
same here in New Port Richey

In Sarasota this makes Ian look like a stroll in the park on a Sunday afternoon. I’m shocked at how relentless this “Tropical Storm” is. The lightning, intense rain, tornado warnings, flash flooding and insane wind is nothing I’ve experienced in my 20 years of living here. The dirty side of this storm is NO JOKE! How is this not a category 2 or 3??? I’m exhausted too and all I did was stay home 🤷‍♀️
agreed. Felt just as bad as Ian for us in St Petersburg. Still going, too
I so agree. Very stressful to me. And STILL going. I let water out of my pool 3x.

Hurricane Categories
Category 1 Winds 74 to 95 mph
Category 2 Winds 96 to 110 mph.
Category 3 Winds 111 to 130 mph
Category 4Winds 131 to 155 mph
Category 5 Winds greater than 155 mph
rainfall has no factor in determining category, it is windspeed
I'm in Englewood and still getting rain, wind, and lightening. This is one heck of a tropical storm.
it’s a hurricane now.
yes I am surprised at all the comments about how bad it is seeing as it's not expected to go past a cat one and it's not yet made landfall. Take care out there!
It’s a hurricane now.

in Sarasota too husband left to work in his truck at 3am said he almost didn’t make it and had to rescue a lady stuck in flooding water also trying to make it to work. This is the worst I’ve ever seen been here since 2017
I just LOST. my tree to the storm. Northdale. County said we are THE 12th.
Whew... amazing the crazy bands of wind and rain were still getting way down in Charlotte County!
Anyone know or think any flights will be flying into Tampa airport this evening?
My daughter is in largo with her boyfriend .What is the best time for her to come home across the Gandy we are in plant city ?
24 hours ago.
It was BAD ! I have to say the worse I’ve seen since moving here in 2010 . That wind and rain 😳. Pete and I hardly slept . ✌️❤️🇺🇸

How is it in temple terrace
I got a dr appt there this morning
it's fine. Raining, but no other problems. You should be able to keep your doctor appointment with no problem.
i heard its on a path towards Greenville SC with lots of rain
Looks like Suwannee is taking the hit.
The western edge of St Pete (1 block from the inland water) has intermittent wind gusts. Not raining at the moment. We have power, thankfully.
Any reports of storm surge in Treasure Island?
I'm in Jungle Terrace on the other side of the inland water.
